patch.value:
## Context

PR #238 shipped the bulk of GH-157 (default score threshold via --min-score, exact phrase via --match-mode exact, --count mode, relevance ranking). Two asks remain:

1. **Structured inline query syntax**: parse `tag:domain:game status:open` tokens inside the query string as filters (complement to keyword/semantic). The equivalent --tag/--status flags already exist; this is the inline-token parsing sugar.
2. **Matched-text highlighting**: highlight the matching substring within each matched field in output. matched_fields is already surfaced; per-field text highlighting is not.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Inline `field:value` tokens (tag:, status:, type:, priority:) parsed out of the query and applied as filters; remaining tokens used for keyword/semantic match
- [ ] Documented precedence when both inline token and explicit flag are provided
- [ ] Optional --highlight to emit matched spans per field (off by default for token efficiency)
- [ ] Contracts/MCP/completions/docs updated
- [ ] Tests + 100% coverage of new logic

## Evidence
- GH-157 (open); PR #238 shipped the threshold/exact/count parts
pm search: structured inline query syntax (tag:/status:) + matched-text highlighting (GH-157 remainder)
